servinfo.title: Synchronizer Part Inspection
servinfo.ptxt: Check clearance “a” between synchronizer ring (2) and gear (1). Check each chamfered tooth of gear, synchronizer ring and sleeve for damage. If check result is not OK, replace defective part.

spec.title: Clearance “a” between synchronizer ring and gear

servinfo.ptxt: Put the 2nd gear synchronizer outer ring (1), inner ring (3) and the center cone (2) together and then measure the step difference between the outer ring and the inner ring. Also check each chamfered tooth of gear and synchronizer ring for damage and replace it with new one, if necessary.

spec.title: Difference “b” between synchronizer outer ring and inner ring
